title: Superflat Plus
description: SuperFlat World! With all structures,better desnity,lucky blocks support and more!
body:
Mod that adds 2 new world types:
- Superflat Plus
- air Life[in beta]

Features:
- Support for all structures to spawn in superflat world
- Suport for lucky blocks in superflat and normal flat world
- Support for nether and end mobs spawning in superflat world

Note: Air Life world type is very early beta and the mod in general is in beta!

Suggestions and Bug request -> **[There!](https://discord.gg/MpuFrKAYtK)**
